name: Brooks Adrenaline GTS 23
description: The ultimate stability running shoe for overpronators. GuideRails holistic support system keeps excess movement in check. DNA LOFT v3 cushioning provides a plush, smooth feel mile after mile.

name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Inspired by two icons of Air: the Air Max 180 and Air Max 93. The Nike Air Max 270 delivers a super-soft ride feel and all-day comfort with the largest Air unit to date.

name: Timberland 6-Inch Premium Waterproof Boot
description: Classic waterproof leather boot with seam-sealed construction. Features a rustproof speed-lace hardware system and a lug outsole for traction on all terrain.

name: Birkenstock Arizona Soft Footbed
description: The iconic Arizona two-strap sandal with a soft contoured footbed for maximum comfort. Adjustable buckle straps allow a custom fit. Perfect for warm-weather walking.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: Engineered with Boost midsole technology for incredible energy return. Primeknit+ upper adapts to every step. A high-performance running shoe designed for road and track.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star
description: The original basketball shoe turned cultural icon. Canvas upper, rubber outsole, and the unmistakable ankle patch. A timeless silhouette that goes with everything.

name: Patagonia Nano Puff Jacket
description: Windproof and water-resistant PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco jacket. Incredibly lightweight and compressible. Perfect for layering or wearing on its own in cold weather.

name: Canada Goose Expedition Parka
description: The most recognizable cold-weather parka in the world. Designed for extreme Arctic expeditions. Features coyote fur trim hood, recessed knit storm cuffs, and 625-fill power duck down.

name: Levi's Sherpa Trucker Jacket
description: A modern update to the classic trucker jacket. Cozy sherpa lining throughout provides warmth. Chest and side welt pockets. Perfect for the transitional seasons.

name: Arc'teryx Beta AR Jacket
description: Hardshell jacket built for sustained activity in variable alpine conditions. Gore-Tex Pro fabric delivers maximum protection against rain and wind while remaining breathable.

name: Zara Oversized Wool Blend Coat
description: Sophisticated oversized coat in a premium wool blend. Lapel collar, long sleeves, and welt pockets. Relaxed silhouette for an effortlessly chic look.

name: North Face Thermoball Eco Vest
description: Lightweight insulated vest with ThermoBall Eco insulation made from 100% recycled materials. Packable and warm. Great as a mid-layer or standalone piece.

name: Herschel Little America Backpack
description: A modern classic with a heritage look. Features laptop sleeve, interior organizer pocket, and signature striped fabric lining. Fits up to 15-inch laptops. 25L capacity.

name: Louis Vuitton Neverfull MM
description: The iconic Louis Vuitton tote in Monogram canvas. Spacious interior with removable pouch. Side laces allow flexible bag volume. Timeless everyday luxury.

name: Fjallraven Kanken Classic
description: The Swedish backpack born in 1978 for school children that became a global lifestyle icon. Durable Vinylon F fabric, iconic color combinations. Perfect for daily commuting.

name: Tumi Alpha 3 Brief
description: Professional leather briefcase with innovative add-a-bag sleeve. FXT ballistic nylon construction for exceptional durability. Fits 15-inch laptop. Ideal for business travel.

name: Everlane Day Market Tote
description: A structured tote made from 100% recycled plastic bottles. Reinforced handles and a zippered interior pocket. Goes from grocery run to beach day effortlessly.

name: Gucci Dionysus Small Shoulder Bag
description: Compact shoulder bag featuring the iconic Dionysus closure inspired by the Greek god. Suede lining with internal zip pocket. Removable chain strap for versatile styling.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling with two processors and eight microphones. Up to 30-hour battery with quick charge. Crystal clear hands-free calling. The benchmark in wireless headphones.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
description: Active Noise Cancellation, Transparency mode, and Personalized Spatial Audio. Adaptive Audio automatically adjusts between modes. Up to 6 hours listening time (30 hours with case).

name: Keychron K2 Wireless Mechanical Keyboard
description: Compact 75% layout with Bluetooth 5.1 and USB-C wired mode. Hot-swappable switches, RGB backlight, and compatible with Mac and Windows. Built on a sturdy aluminum frame.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: The most advanced mouse for creators and engineers. 8K DPI sensor works on any surface including glass. MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel. Connects to up to 3 devices simultaneously.

name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 Ultra
description: 14.6-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with 120Hz. IP68 water resistance. S Pen included for creativity and productivity. Powerful Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 for AI-enhanced performance.

name: Bose SoundLink Flex Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof, dustproof portable Bluetooth speaker. PositionIQ technology optimizes sound whether upright or on its side. 12 hours battery. Built to withstand the elements.

name: IKEA RANARP Floor Lamp
description: Industrial-style floor lamp with adjustable arm and shade. Creates a cozy, directed light ideal for reading nooks. E26 bulb socket. Powder-coated metal in off-white.

name: Monstera Deliciosa Plant
description: The iconic Swiss cheese plant with dramatic split leaves. A beloved houseplant that thrives in bright indirect light. Ships in a 6-inch nursery pot. Low-maintenance tropical beauty.

name: Fellow Stagg EKG Kettle
description: Variable temperature electric kettle with precision pour spout. Perfect for pour-over coffee and tea. Hold mode maintains temperature for 60 minutes. Minimalist matte black design.

name: Brooklinen Luxe Core Sheet Set
description: 480-thread count long-staple cotton sheets. Percale weave for a crisp, cool feel. Includes flat sheet, fitted sheet, and two pillowcases. Machine washable. OEKO-TEX certified.

name: Aarke Carbonator III
description: Stainless steel sparkling water maker with a sleek Scandinavian design. Compatible with standard 60L CO2 cylinders. Makes up to 60L of sparkling water per cylinder. BPA-free.

name: Aesop Resurrection Aromatique Hand Wash
description: A botanical hand wash with a refreshing blend of Mandarin Rind, Rosemary Leaf, and Cedar Atlas. Formulated to cleanse without stripping natural oils. Suitable for frequent use.
